name: notion-sources
description: Extract a Notion database into a batch of per-source Markdown files (one per row, YAML front matter) plus a manifest (sources.json + index.md). Schema-agnostic: detects URLs anywhere in a row and maps metadata by property type + fuzzy name, so it handles differently-structured databases gracefully. Incremental: re-runs append new sources to an existing batch. Standalone CLI: notion-sources.
